languages.text: "Только прошу, поберегите время. После пропажи сил Гапраков армия Драйвстемов — единственная опора династии, и мне, как маршалу доминиона, нужно многое распланировать".

traits.locale_text: "Только прошу, поберегите время. После пропажи сил Гапраков армия Драйвстемов — единственная опора династии, и мне, как маршалу доминиона, нужно многое распланировать".

languages.text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."
languages.original_text: "Только прошу, поберегите время. После пропажи сил Гапраков армия Драйвстемов — единственная опора династии, и мне, как маршалу доминиона, нужно многое распланировать".

traits.locale_text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

"My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

"My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

languages.text: “我的时间很宝贵，可别误了我的事。贾帕克家的军队覆灭之后，德莱夫斯塔家的军队就成了王朝唯一的倚仗，而我身为统领元帅，有许多事需要筹划。”
languages.original_text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

traits.locale_text: “我的时间很宝贵，可别误了我的事。贾帕克家的军队覆灭之后，德莱夫斯塔家的军队就成了王朝唯一的倚仗，而我身为统领元帅，有许多事需要筹划。”

languages.text: « Mon temps est précieux, je vous prierai donc de ne pas me le faire perdre inutilement. Maintenant que nous avons perdu les troupes de la maison Gaprak, la dynastie ne peut plus compter que sur le soutien de l'armée des Drivestem. Étant la maréchale du territoire, j'ai beaucoup de choses à planifier. »
languages.original_text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

traits.locale_text: « Mon temps est précieux, je vous prierai donc de ne pas me le faire perdre inutilement. Maintenant que nous avons perdu les troupes de la maison Gaprak, la dynastie ne peut plus compter que sur le soutien de l'armée des Drivestem. Étant la maréchale du territoire, j'ai beaucoup de choses à planifier. »

languages.text: "Vaktim değerlidir, bu yüzden boşa harcanmamalı. Gaprak güçlerinin kaybıyla birlikte Drivestem ordusu, hanedanlığın tek destek kaynağı olarak kaldı ve kuvvet komutanı olarak planlamam gereken çok şey var."
languages.original_text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

traits.locale_text: "Vaktim değerlidir, bu yüzden boşa harcanmamalı. Gaprak güçlerinin kaybıyla birlikte Drivestem ordusu, hanedanlığın tek destek kaynağı olarak kaldı ve kuvvet komutanı olarak planlamam gereken çok şey var."

languages.text: «Mi tiempo es valioso, así que no lo malgaste. Tras la pérdida de las fuerzas Gaprak, el ejército Drivestem es el único apoyo de la dinastía y, como mariscal del dominio, tengo mucho que planear».
languages.original_text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

traits.locale_text: «Mi tiempo es valioso, así que no lo malgaste. Tras la pérdida de las fuerzas Gaprak, el ejército Drivestem es el único apoyo de la dinastía y, como mariscal del dominio, tengo mucho que planear».

languages.text: "Meine Zeit ist kostbar, also vergeudet sie bitte nicht. Angesichts des Verlustes der Gaprak-Truppen kann allein die Armee der Drivestems die Dynastie unterstützen, und als Reichsmarschallin muss ich viel planen."
languages.original_text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Zeit ist kostbar, also vergeudet sie bitte nicht. Angesichts des Verlustes der Gaprak-Truppen kann allein die Armee der Drivestems die Dynastie unterstützen, und als Reichsmarschallin muss ich viel planen."

languages.text: 「私の時間は貴重なので、無駄にしないでください。ギャプラク軍の敗北により、ドライブスチーム軍は王朝唯一の支援源となりました。ドミニオンの将軍として、私は多くの計画を立てる必要があります。」
languages.original_text: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."

traits.locale_text: 「私の時間は貴重なので、無駄にしないでください。ギャプラク軍の敗北により、ドライブスチーム軍は王朝唯一の支援源となりました。ドミニオンの将軍として、私は多くの計画を立てる必要があります。」
